title: String in unpacked struct forced to packed produces confusing internal errors

features.name: unpacked struct with string field and other fields
features.description: Code should include an unpacked struct containing a string field alongside at least one other field, where assignment to the string field triggers an internal error
features.snippet: struct packed { logic [7:0] b; } st; st.a = "content";

features.name: string assignment in struct with multiple fields
features.description: Code should include an unpacked struct with multiple fields where assigning a string literal to the string-typed field causes an internal error in the V3Number pass
features.snippet: typedef struct { byte unsigned x; string s; } mystruct_t; mystruct_t st; st.s = "hello";
